answer: Pricing depends on scope. Typical projects include landing pages, business websites, dashboards, CRM systems and ongoing maintenance.
We can build secure dashboards with authentication, profile management, file uploads, project tracking and CRM messaging.
CRM can include lead management, request statuses, quote tracking, notes, unread counters and admin workflows.
A landing page may take around 1-2 weeks. Custom dashboards or CRM projects usually take several weeks depending on complexity.
Yes, we offer website maintenance, technical support, content updates and feature upgrades.
